translations: (to) his Lord Indeed, [I] has touched me
puzzle.hint: This is a powerful supplication made by a Prophet known for his immense patience during a period of great trial.
puzzle.arabic: ۞ وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ
puzzle.verseEn: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."
